zh-CN.name: 字母W
zh-CN.intro: W是字母表里第23个字母，它也是一个数字朋友哦！23是比22多1的数，它是个单数，很特别吧？

story.title: 🔤W和它的数字朋友23
story.body: 高高的字母山上，住着字母W和数字23。W长得像两座小山，23圆圆的像个可爱的小鸭子。W说：“我是第23个字母，我的数字朋友就是23！”23高兴地拍拍手：“我刚好是单数，而且是质数呢！”它们手拉手，一起数数：1、2、3……一直数到23。W说：“数到23真开心，就像我两座小山抱在一起！”小朋友，你也来数一数，找到生活中的23吧。

knowledge.title: W为什么是第23个字母？
knowledge.body: 字母表里有很多字母，大家排排队。A排第1，B排第2，一直排到W，刚好是第23个。23是一个有趣的数字，它是单数，也叫做质数，只能被1和自己除。

en.name: Letter W
en.intro: W is the 23rd letter of the alphabet, and it also has a number friend! 23 comes after 22, and it is an odd number. Isn't that special?

story.title: 🔤W and Its Number Friend 23
story.body: On Alphabet Mountain live Letter W and Number 23. W looks like two little hills, and 23 is round like a cute duckling. W says, 'I am the 23rd letter, so my number friend is 23!' 23 claps happily, 'I am an odd number and a prime number too!' They hold hands and count together: 1, 2, 3... all the way to 23. W says, 'Counting to 23 is so much fun, just like my two hills hugging!' Little one, let's count and find 23 in life.

knowledge.title: Why is W the 23rd letter?
knowledge.body: In the alphabet, all letters line up. A is first, B is second, and when we reach W, it's the 23rd. 23 is a fun number: it's odd and a prime number, which means it can only be divided by 1 and itself.
